name: accordion-conductor-tiered-relevance
description: Relevance-driven level-of-detail conductor for Accordion — every block sits at the fidelity tier (Full/Trim/Digest/Group) its unified relevance earns; a 60–90% hysteresis band makes fold/unfold one stable re-tiering. Embeddings via nomic-embed-text; LLM digests via Ollama/Haiku with deterministic fallback.
